title: rubus fragilipes
intro: Rubus fragilipes, also known as the Himalayan raspberry, is a type of edible plant that belongs to the rose family. The plant's leaves, stems, and roots have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rubus fragilipes include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support digestive function, as well as its potential to aid in the management of diabetes and certain types of cancer. Herbal preparations of Rubus fragilipes can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
